programme.desc: Glacann Angelo páirt sa chomórtas teilifíse 'Poll Nathracha'. (Angelo enters the Snake Pit with his latest business idea.)

programme.title: Dónall Dána
programme.desc: Tá Dónall ag iarraidh na Francaigh Fheoite Fhiáine a fheiceáil ag ceol. (Henry wants to see the Killer Boy Rats play.)

programme.title: Cúla4
programme.desc: Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)

programme.title: Super Simple Amhráin
programme.desc: Amhrán spraíúil faoin mbogha báistí a bheidh againn inniu. (A fun song about the rainbow.)

programme.title: Blocuimhreacha
programme.desc: Léann Cúig Déag scéalta do na déaga. (Are you sitting comfortably? Then we'll begin a bedtime story all about Numberblocks Eleven to Fifteen.)

programme.title: Blocdhathanna
programme.desc: Téann Corcra ar aistear beag sa Domhan nua seo. (Purple goes on a little adventure in this new World.)

programme.title: Na Blociontais
programme.desc: Tá Gabh agus Stop ag fáil faoi réir do phicnic. (Sing along with Go and Stop as they get ready for a picnic.)

programme.title: Am Foghlama le Timmy
programme.desc: Ligeann Timmy air féin gur dochtúir é agus é ag cabhrú le Teidí. (Timmy is a doctor today and he helps Teddy.)

programme.title: Lá Le Mamó nó Daideo
programme.desc: Tá Ciarán leis an lá a chaitheamh in éineacht lena Dhaideo Máirtín i Ráth Chairn. (Ciarán is getting ready to spend the day with his Daideo Máirtín.)

programme.title: Pip & Posy
programme.desc: Tugann Posy bréagán do Pip mar bhronntanas ach tá sé aige cheana. (Posy buys a toy for Pip as a present but it's something he already has.)

programme.title: Béiríní is a Leabhair
programme.desc: Tugann Bromaire faoi deara go n-imíonn an lá go tapa nuair a bhíonn sé gnóthach. (Bromaire realizes that busy times seem to pass quickly.)

programme.title: Béiríní is a Leabhair
programme.desc: Tá Art ag iarraidh úll a bhaint de chrann le tabhairt do mhuc ar an bhfeirm. (Art persists in trying to get an apple from a tree.)

programme.title: Pikwik Pack
programme.desc: Tá iontas ar Phaca Pikwik go bhfuil pacáiste tagtha do Shlíomach, an t-iora dána! (The Pikwik Pack are surprised when a package arrives for Sneaky Squirrel.)

programme.title: Nuair a Bheidh Mé Mór
programme.desc: Samhlaíonn Ruarc a shaol ina stiúrthóir cóir nuair a bheidh sé mór, le cúnamh ó Shióg na bPost. (Ruarc imagines his life as a choir master when he grows up.)

programme.title: Zou
programme.desc: Foghlaimeoidh Zou le snámh inniu. (Zou learns to swim today.)

programme.title: Dee Dee
programme.desc: Ta cóisir ollmhór le bheith ag an Méara de Pfeffel. (Mayor de Pfeffel is having a party this afternoon.)

programme.title: Is Mise
programme.desc: Beidh Cian ag foghlaim faoi tharracóirí agus an tábhacht atá leo ar an bhfeirm. (Today, Cian will learn about tractors and just how important they are on the farm.)

programme.title: Ainmhithe Craiceáilte
programme.desc: Pearóidí ar ghluaisrothair, turcaí olc agus béar in ionad campála a bheidh againn inniu. (We have motorcycle-riding parrots, an angry turkey & a bear stops by a campsite.)

programme.title: Comhrá
programme.desc: Helen Shackleton, Ciarraíoch atá ag cur fúithi i gCill Dara, a bheidh ag comhrá le Máirtín Tom Sheáinín. (Helen Shackleton, originally from Kerry, is this week's guest.)

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Tá fear nua ag Rose - dochtúir nach bhfuil airde ar bith ann. (Rose has a new date but he isn't the tallest.)

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Tá fear nua ag Dorothy ach ní fada go bhfaigheann sí amach go bhfuil sé pósta! (Dorothy embarks on a fresh new relationship only to find out that this new boyfriend is married.)

programme.title: Geantraí
programme.desc: Is in Hugh Lynch's sa Tulach Mhór i gContae Uíbh Fhailí a rinneadh taifeadadh ar an gclár seo. (Hugh Lynch's in Tullamore Co. Offaly is the venue for this episode of Geantraí.)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Cuirtear i leith duine, a bhfuil gaol i bhfad amach ag Jessica leis, gur dúnmharfóir é. (A distant cousin of Jessica's is falsely accused of murder.)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Tá Jessica leis an Nollaig a chaitheamh in éineacht lena seanchara, Lloyd Marcus. (Jessica is spending her holidays with an old friend, Lloyd Marcus.)

programme.title: Taste of Australia with Hayden Quinn
programme.desc: Fileann Hayden ar an bhfód dúchais chun críoch a chur leis an tsraith in Northern Beaches. (Hayden is back home to finish up the season on the Northern Beaches.)

programme.title: Glór Tíre - Rogha & Togha
programme.desc: Beidh maithe agus móruaisle an cheoil ar stáitse i dTeach na Céibhe le scoth na n-amhrán. (The best selection of songs from the 11th instalment of the country music series.)

programme.title: The Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: Tá Rory le cóisir mhór a eagrú dá máthair fad atá Lorelai ag iarraidh an t-óstán a chur ar ais mar a bhí. (Lorelai deals with the rebuilding of the fire-damaged inn.)

programme.desc: Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)

programme.title: Scéalta na gCorn
programme.desc: Teann Gráinne McElwain sa tóir ar scéalta na gcorn CLG. (From the most prestigious cups to the lesser-known trophies, the stories behind Ireland's Gaelic games silverware.)

programme.title: Glúin Z
programme.desc: Díreofar ar an todhchaí sa gceathrú chlár ag féachaint ar na dúshláin atá i ndán do Ghlúin Z.(In episode 4 the focus is on the future and the challenges that lie ahead of Glúin Z.)

programme.title: Pobail na Páirce
programme.desc: Tabharfar aghaidh ar Pháirc Tailteann san Uaimh i gContae na Mí sa gclár seo. (This week we visit Páirc Tailteann in Navan, County Meath.)

programme.title: Blas Bluegrass
programme.desc: Beidh ceol ó Late For The Train, Ian Knepper, agus Gadan i gclár deiridh na sraithe. (The final episode of the series features musicians who have featured across the series.)

programme.title: An Western: Winchester '73
programme.desc: Téann buachaill bó ar aistear fíochmhar chun raidhfil a goideadh uaidh a fháil ar ais. (A cowboy's obsession with a stolen rifle leads to an odyssey through the American West.)
